noncomputable abbrev HModule'_sequence
    (k : Type u) [Field k]
    {C : Type v} [Category.{u, v} C] {J : GrothendieckTopology C}
    [HasWeakSheafify J (Type u)] [HasSheafify J (ModuleCat.{u} k)]
    [HasExt (Sheaf J (ModuleCat.{u} k))]
    (S : J.MayerVietorisSquare) (F : Sheaf J (ModuleCat.{u} k))
    (n₀ n₁ : ℕ) (h : n₀ + 1 = n₁) :
    ComposableArrows AddCommGrpCat 5 :=
  ComposableArrows.mk₅ (HModule'_toBiprod k S F n₀) (HModule'_fromBiprod k S F n₀)
    (HModule'_δ k S F n₀ n₁ h)
    (HModule'_toBiprod k S F n₁) (HModule'_fromBiprod k S F n₁)

attempts.insight: Probe-confirmed `ComposableArrows.mk₅` body adopted verbatim. `noncomputable abbrev` (rather than `noncomputable def`) is load-bearing for downstream `dsimp`-based unfolding in iter-023+ `HModule'_sequenceIso` / iter-024+ `HModule'_sequence_exact`. The codomain `ComposableArrows AddCommGrpCat 5` is forced by the `AddCommGrpCat`-flavor of each individual building block (each lands in `AddCommGrpCat`-morphisms because iter-016 `HModule'_cohomologyPresheaf k F n` always lands in `Cᵒᵖ ⥤ AddCommGrpCat`). `[HasExt (Sheaf J (ModuleCat.{u} k))]` typeclass is transitively load-bearing via `HModule'_δ`. The `mk₅` qualified call (no `open ComposableArrows`) follows the directive's guidance to keep the file's existing `open` directive untouched. lean_diagnostic_messages on the file post-Edit: zero errors, one cosmetic `linter.style.longLine` warning on a 101-column docstring line (fixed by Edit 2). lean_verify: kernel-only axioms `[propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound]`.

Worth budgeting for one cosmetic touch-up per round when the docstring contains long path references.
